thought_beat_text: He runs the approach again — timer, bridge, the exact weight of the moment — and it holds together right up until the stage light catches the cardboard edge of the wall, and then the whole rehearsal shudders like a set piece being tested for the first time. The urgency is real, he insists to himself, which is exactly what someone would say if it weren't.
residue_summary: The rehearsal almost convinced him, but the cardboard edge flickered at the wrong moment and now the sincerity of the mission has a hairline crack running through it.
image_hint: spotlight catching the raw edge of a painted flat mid-performance
audio_hint: tense procedural rhythm interrupted by a single hollow knock
